raw_excerpt: Letta Code is the memory-first coding agent. December 16, 2025. The #1 model-agnostic OSS harness on TerminalBench, comparable to provider-specific harnesses (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Codex CLI). Memory initialization via /init. Skill Learning via /remember. Skills as .md files in git. Vector + FTS + hybrid search over messages. Conversations API (Jan 21, 2026) for shared agent memory across concurrent experiences. Letta Code app (Apr 6, 2026) for local-machine use. Context Repositories (Feb 12, 2026) — git-based memory.
